message:
chore(beads): create comprehensive test coverage bead structure (8 epics, 43 beads)

8 epics covering all test gaps:
- packages/core: 5 tasks (search engine, export, template, prompts, cost)
- packages/cli: 5 tasks (core/discovery/premium commands, lib modules, utilities)
- apps/web lib: 5 tasks (accessibility, utils, health/admin/seo, animations, support)
- apps/web hooks: 4 tasks (UI, gesture, feature, platform hooks)
- apps/web components: 6 tasks (landing, transcript, mobile, UI, features, remaining)
- apps/web API routes: 3 tasks (admin, public, resource routes)
- reduce mock usage: 3 tasks (API routes, hooks, components)
- E2E infrastructure: 10 tasks (fix deps, logging, verify specs, CLI, CI, production)

Dependency graph: 49 open beads, 36 actionable, 13 blocked.
Critical path: bd-tk35 (fix E2E deps) → verify specs → CI → production smoke tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
